en: Then Jacob went on his journey and came to the land of the people of the east.
zh: 雅各繼續前行，到了東方人的地方。

en: As he looked, he saw a well in the field, and behold, three flocks of sheep lying beside it, for out of that well the flocks were watered. The stone on the well's mouth was large,
zh: 他看見田間有一口井；有三群羊躺臥在井旁，因為人都是用那井裡的水給羊群喝；井口上有一塊大石頭。

en: and when all the flocks were gathered there, the shepherds would roll the stone from the mouth of the well and water the sheep, and put the stone back in its place over the mouth of the well.
zh: 當所有羊群都到齊了，牧人就把井口的石頭輥開，取水給羊群喝，然後把石頭放回井口原處。

en: Jacob said to them, "My brothers, where do you come from?" They said, "We are from Haran."
zh: 雅各問這些牧人：“弟兄們，你們是哪裡來的？”他們回答：“我們是從哈蘭來的。”

en: He said to them, "Do you know Laban the son of Nahor?" They said, "We know him."
zh: 他問他們：“你們認識拿鶴的孫子拉班嗎？”他們回答：“我們認識。”

en: He said to them, "Is it well with him?" They said, "It is well; and see, Rachel his daughter is coming with the sheep!"
zh: 雅各又問他們：“他平安嗎？”他們回答：“平安。你看，他的女兒拉結領著羊群來了。”

en: He said, "Behold, it is still high day; it is not time for the livestock to be gathered together. Water the sheep and go, pasture them."
zh: 雅各說：“現在太陽還高，不是牲畜聚集的時候；你們取水給羊群喝，再去牧放吧。”

en: But they said, "We cannot until all the flocks are gathered together and the stone is rolled from the mouth of the well; then we water the sheep."
zh: 他們回答：“我們不能這樣作，必須等到所有的羊群都到齊了，有人把井口的石頭輥開，我們才可以取水給羊群喝。”

en: While he was still speaking with them, Rachel came with her father's sheep, for she was a shepherdess.
zh: 雅各還跟他們說話的時候，拉結領著她父親的羊群來了。拉結原來是個牧羊女。

en: Now as soon as Jacob saw Rachel the daughter of Laban his mother's brother, and the sheep of Laban his mother's brother, Jacob came near and rolled the stone from the well's mouth and watered the flock of Laban his mother's brother.
zh: 雅各看見了舅父拉班的女兒拉結，和舅父拉班的羊群，就上前來，把井口的石頭輥開，取水給舅父拉班的羊群喝。

en: Then Jacob kissed Rachel and wept aloud.
zh: 雅各和拉結親吻，就放聲大哭。

en: And Jacob told Rachel that he was her father's kinsman, and that he was Rebekah's son, and she ran and told her father.
zh: 雅各告訴拉結，自己是她父親的外甥，是利百加的兒子。拉結就跑去告訴她的父親。

en: As soon as Laban heard the news about Jacob, his sister's son, he ran to meet him and embraced him and kissed him and brought him to his house. Jacob told Laban all these things,
zh: 拉班聽見了關於外甥雅各的消息，就跑去迎接他，擁抱他，和他親吻，帶他到自己的家裡。雅各就把一切經過都告訴拉班。

en: and Laban said to him, "Surely you are my bone and my flesh!" And he stayed with him a month.
zh: 拉班對雅各說：“你實在是我的骨肉。”雅各就與拉班同住了一個月。

en: Then Laban said to Jacob, "Because you are my kinsman, should you therefore serve me for nothing? Tell me, what shall your wages be?"
zh: 拉班對雅各說：“你因為是我的外甥，就要白白地服事我嗎？告訴我，你要甚麼報酬？”

en: Now Laban had two daughters. The name of the older was Leah, and the name of the younger was Rachel.
zh: 拉班有兩個女兒；大的名叫利亞，小的名叫拉結。

en: Leah's eyes were weak, but Rachel was beautiful in form and appearance.
zh: 利亞的眼睛雖然可愛，拉結卻生得身材美麗，樣貌娟秀。

en: Jacob loved Rachel. And he said, "I will serve you seven years for your younger daughter Rachel."
zh: 雅各愛拉結，所以對拉班說：“我願為你的小女兒拉結服事你七年。”

en: Laban said, "It is better that I give her to you than that I should give her to any other man; stay with me."
zh: 拉班說：“我把她給你，比給別人更好，你就與我同住吧。”

en: So Jacob served seven years for Rachel, and they seemed to him but a few days because of the love he had for her.
zh: 於是，雅各為拉結服事了拉班七年；他就看這七年好像幾天一樣，因為他愛拉結。

en: Then Jacob said to Laban, "Give me my wife that I may go in to her, for my time is completed."
zh: 雅各對拉班說：“期限到了，請把我的妻子給我，好讓我與她親近。”

en: So Laban gathered together all the people of the place and made a feast.
zh: 拉班就擺設筵席，邀請了那地方所有的人。

en: But in the evening he took his daughter Leah and brought her to Jacob, and he went in to her.
zh: 到了晚上，拉班把自己的女兒利亞帶來給雅各，雅各就與她親近。

en: (Laban gave his female servant Zilpah to his daughter Leah to be her servant.)
zh: 拉班又把自己的婢女悉帕給了女兒利亞作婢女。

en: And in the morning, behold, it was Leah! And Jacob said to Laban, "What is this you have done to me? Did I not serve with you for Rachel? Why then have you deceived me?"
zh: 到了早晨，雅各才看出原來是利亞，就對拉班說：“你向我作的是甚麼事呢？我服事你，不是為了拉結的緣故嗎？你為甚麼欺騙我呢？”

en: Laban said, "It is not so done in our country, to give the younger before the firstborn.
zh: 拉班回答：“大女兒還沒有出嫁，就先把小女兒嫁出去，我們這地方是沒有這規矩的。

en: Complete the week of this one, and we will give you the other also in return for serving me another seven years."
zh: 你與大女兒七天的慶典過了以後，我們也把小女兒給你，只是你要再服事我七年。”

en: Jacob did so, and completed her week. Then Laban gave him his daughter Rachel to be his wife.
zh: 於是雅各這樣作了。他與利亞七天的慶典過了以後，拉班就把自己的女兒拉結給雅各為妻。

en: (Laban gave his female servant Bilhah to his daughter Rachel to be her servant.)
zh: 拉班又把自己的婢女辟拉給了女兒拉結作婢女。

en: So Jacob went in to Rachel also, and he loved Rachel more than Leah, and served Laban for another seven years.
zh: 雅各也與拉結親近，並且愛拉結勝過愛利亞；於是他再服事了拉班七年。

en: When the LORD saw that Leah was hated, he opened her womb, but Rachel was barren.
zh: 耶和華見利亞失寵，就使她生育，拉結卻不生育。

en: And Leah conceived and bore a son, and she called his name Reuben, for she said, "Because the LORD has looked upon my affliction; for now my husband will love me."
zh: 利亞懷孕，生了一個兒子，就給他起名叫流本，因為她說：“耶和華看見了我的苦情，現在我的丈夫必愛我了。”

en: She conceived again and bore a son, and said, "Because the LORD has heard that I am hated, he has given me this son also." And she called his name Simeon.
zh: 她又懷孕，生了一個兒子，就說：“耶和華因為聽見我失寵，所以又賜給我這個兒子。”於是給他起名叫西緬。

en: Again she conceived and bore a son, and said, "Now this time my husband will be attached to me, because I have borne him three sons." Therefore his name was called Levi.
zh: 她又懷孕，生了一個兒子，就說：“這一次，我的丈夫要依戀我了，因為我已經給他生了三個兒子。”因此給孩子起名叫利未。

en: And she conceived again and bore a son, and said, "This time I will praise the LORD." Therefore she called his name Judah. Then she ceased bearing.
zh: 她又懷孕，生了一個兒子，就說：“這一次，我要讚美耶和華了。”因此給孩子起名叫猶大。這樣，她才停止了生育。
